message:
fix(vfs): use libc::c_short cast for F_UNLCK in check_reserved_lock

Replace i16::try_from(F_UNLCK) with a direct cast to libc::c_short,
consistent with the earlier posix_lock() cross-platform refactor.
Avoids potential panic on platforms where F_UNLCK exceeds i16 range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
